CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(FEC_Assignment_Status__c, "Completed"), ISPICKVAL(FEC_Assignment_Status__c, "AutoCompleted"), ISPICKVAL(FEC_Assignment_Status__c, "AutoRecall") ), "Unassigned", IF( NOT(ISBLANK(FEC_Assignment_Owner__c)), LEFT(FEC_Assignment_Owner__r.Email, FIND("@", FEC_Assignment_Owner__r.Email) - 1), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(FEC_OwnerID__c)), FEC_OwnerID__c, "" ) ) )
CustomField.label: Assignment Owner (Text)
